title: alyssum tortuosum var. longistylum
intro: Alyssum tortuosum var. longistylum, also known as Long-styled Sweet Alyssum, is a perennial plant in the family Boraginaceae, characterized by its small, white, and fragrant flowers. The medicinal properties of Alyssum tortuosum var. longistylum include its potential to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. This plant has been associated with various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, promoting sleep, and improving respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Alyssum tortuosum var. longistylum is often used in teas, infusions, and topical applications to leverage its medicinal properties.
